name: Rubber Dog Ring Toy - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Keep your furry friend happily entertained with this Rubber Dog Ring Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This rubber toy features a knotted ring in orange and a lavender ring connected together to give them fun chewing, fetch and tug-of-war options. Made with a mix of rubber, cotton and polyester, it's sure to be a new favorite.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
